spoonerism: a range is as good as a chest
phrase: a change is as good as a rest

spoonerism: rat on a cot tin hoof
phrase: cat on a hot tin roof

spoonerism: drup with a cink in it
phrase: cup with a drink in it

spoonerism: cutting off your nose to fite your space
phrase: cutting off your nose to spite your face

spoonerism: full of the sproys of jing
phrase: full of the joys of spring

spoonerism: grab the hull by the borns
phrase: grab the bull by the horns

spoonerism: passing like nips in the shight
phrase: passing like ships in the night

spoonerism: too many spooks coil the broth
phrase: too many cooks spoil the broth
